sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105093" key="trio/rguios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρῐ-όργυιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n105093.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f. l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">τριώρυγος</ref> </xr> (q. v.).</sense> </entryFree>
